home.title: Walk with peace
home.subtitle: No rush. Just light, step by step.

progress.title: My Journey
progress.subtitle: Your spiritual progress
progress.reflectionText: Growth happens in small moments—a question that lingers, a feeling of peace, a new understanding. This space is for you to pause and notice how far you've come.
progress.journalReflections: You've written reflections in your journal
progress.emptyText: Every step matters, even the small ones.
progress.nextStepsIntro: When you feel ready, consider these next steps:
progress.exploreLessonDesc: Discover something new about the gospel
progress.footerText: There's no finish line here—just a path walked with the Savior.

baptism.sectionDesc: Baptism is the first covenant with God. Prepare your heart step by step.
baptism.ctaDesc: Doctrinal content, checklist, and scheduled date
baptism.commitmentPrompt: I choose to be baptized because…
baptism.commitmentPlaceholder: Write sincerely what this step means to you.
baptism.keepPreparing: Keep advancing in your spiritual preparation.

sync.offline: Offline. Connect to view your preparation.

agenda.agendaSubtitle: Personalize your special day. The missionary leader will see these preferences.
agenda.confirmImmediately: Do you want immediate confirmation after baptism?
agenda.speakerLabel: Who would you like to speak?
agenda.exportAgendaDesc: Download the agenda as JSON to share with the leader or print.
agenda.suggestHymn1: Suggestion: add an opening hymn to complete the program.
agenda.suggestSpeaker: Suggestion: indicate who you would like to speak.
agenda.suggestOpeningPrayer: Suggestion: add the name for the opening prayer.
agenda.suggestClosingPrayer: Suggestion: add the name for the closing prayer.

journal.title: My Journal
journal.subtitle: A sacred space for your thoughts
journal.placeholder: What's on your heart today? Share a thought, a question, or something you're grateful for...
journal.emptyText: Writing helps us understand what we feel and what we're learning. Start with a single thought—there's no wrong way to begin.

lessons.title: Missionary Path
lessons.subtitle: Five foundational lessons. Truth → purpose → change → life → covenants.
lessons.introText: Each topic invites you to draw closer to God with clarity and peace. No rush, no required order. Come back whenever you want.
lessons.notAvailableText: Check the link or go back to Lessons to choose another topic.
lessons.guideLayeredNote: Open each block slowly and tap the scriptures to read the full passage in a modal.
lessons.openScriptureNote: Tap a reference to open the full passage.
lessons.frequentDoubtsNote: You don't have to read everything in one session. Open what you need today.
lessons.doctrinalQuestionsNote: These questions aren't answered quickly… they are lived.
lessons.realLifeApplication: How to live it in real life
lessons.realLifeApplicationNote: Do not try to do everything today. Choose one small, concrete, faithful step.
lessons.reflectionPlaceholder: Write with sincerity. Don't look for pretty words; look for true words.
lessons.reflectionNote: This is private. You can come back later and continue.
lessons.savedMessage: Your reflection has been saved. You can see it in your Journal.
lessons.footerText: Take your time. Come back whenever you want.
lessons.entryAfterMissionaryPathSubtitle: Resources for new members and the topic library.

lesson.heroNote: Open each block calmly. Complete the practices and write sincerely in the reflection.
lesson.notFoundText: We could not find this lesson. Go back to Training to pick another.
lesson.audioSummaryPlaceholder: A short introduction to this topic. Narrated audio will be available to reinforce what you read.
lesson.audioIntentPlaceholder: Use this lesson calmly: review the objectives, write what you feel, and apply one concrete step in your life.
lesson.imagePromptPlaceholder: Representative image or photo for this lesson topic, respectful and sober style, no identifiable faces. Coming soon.
lesson.practiceRemainingOne: You have 1 practice left to finish.
lesson.practiceRemainingMany: You have {{count}} practices left to finish.
lesson.nextLessonGatedMany: Complete the practices to unlock the next lesson. You have {{count}} practices left.
lesson.nextLessonGatedOne: Complete the practices to unlock the next lesson. You have 1 practice left.

profile.title: Profile
profile.switchModeDesc: Select how you want to use the app. To return to normal member mode, choose "Member".

profileCard.useThisId: Use this ID to register in your ward

profileNewMember.wardInfo: Your ward is your spiritual family. As you attend meetings and activities, you'll build meaningful friendships and find support.

ordinances.title: Ordinance dates
ordinances.subtitle: Baptism and Confirmation
ordinances.infoText: This information must be verified by a bishopric member or ward clerk to confirm your membership.
ordinances.testSwitchText: Testing: switch between investigator and new member views.

none.title: Not verified
none.desc: Complete the information and submit it for verification

pending.title: Pending verification
pending.desc: A ward leader will review this information
pending.devBypass: Test mode: go directly to member profile

rejected.title: Information rejected
rejected.defaultReason: Please review and correct the information

onboarding.screen1Text: A companion on your spiritual journey. No rush, no pressure.
onboarding.screen2Text: 5 lessons that will help you know the gospel of Jesus Christ.
onboarding.screen3Text: Your personal journal is a sacred space for your thoughts and questions.

welcome.title: Welcome to xTheGospel
welcome.subtitle: A simple guide so you can begin with clarity and peace.

slides.title: What is this app?
slides.description: xTheGospel is a companion for your spiritual journey: learn, reflect, and grow step by step.

slides.title: What can you find here?
slides.description: You will find lessons, personal journal, progress tracking, and resources designed to help you come closer to Jesus Christ.

slides.title: Quick tutorial
slides.description: Start with Home, open one lesson, and save a brief reflection in your journal. In a few minutes you will be fully set.

emptyStates.journalText: Writing helps us understand what we feel. Start with a single thought.
emptyStates.progressText: Every step matters, even the small ones.

missionaryProfileWeb.personalCardSubtitle: Keep your details updated so we can contact you securely.
missionaryProfileWeb.memberLeadershipSubtitle: Open the leadership dashboard to support missionary work in the ward.
missionaryProfileWeb.wardLeadershipActiveHelp: You have access to the leadership dashboard with KPIs, investigator follow-up, and coordination tools.
missionaryProfileWeb.wardLeadershipInactiveHelp: If you have a leadership calling (mission leader, quorum presidency, etc.), you can turn on leadership mode.
missionaryProfileWeb.settingsCardSubtitle: Adjust how you use the app and which language you see.
missionaryProfileWeb.currentAppRoleBody: You are using the app as: {{role}}.
missionaryProfileWeb.privacySecuritySubtitle: xTheGospel / For The Gospel uses secure authentication (for example, Firebase Auth) and encrypted storage. Sensitive member or ordinance data is not exposed; you choose what to record and share.

register.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your xTheGospel account
register.friendOptionDesc: I'm new and want to learn about the gospel
register.memberOptionDesc: I want to register my member account
register.selectTypeFooter: You can update your status later if you are baptized
register.termsPrefix: By creating an account, you accept our
register.wardHint: If your leader gave you a code, enter it to join your ward
register.memberFooterNote: Your account will be pending verification by a leader
register.idHintMember: Share this ID with your leader to verify your account
register.idHintFriend: Save this ID for your future records
register.pendingDesc: A ward leader will verify your account soon

errors.userNotFound: No account exists with this email
errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.emailInUse: This email is already registered. Try signing in.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters

newMemberGuide.title: Your Guide
newMemberGuide.subtitle: Resources to help you grow in your new life as a member of the Church
newMemberGuide.libraryNote: Extended topics that used to appear in the investigator path. Open when you need them.
newMemberGuide.footer: Take your time exploring these topics. There's no rush—your journey is personal and the Savior walks with you.

newMemberProgress.subtitleBelonging: You don't need to prove anything here.
newMemberProgress.subtitleUnderstanding: This is not a checklist. It's a mirror.
newMemberProgress.subtitleDefault: This is not a checklist. It's a quiet reflection of your presence.
newMemberProgress.footerUnderstanding: Faith grows in community, not performance.
newMemberProgress.footerDefault: You don't need to do anything right now.
newMemberProgress.footerSaviorAlways: The Savior walks with you, always.
newMemberProgress.momentGuideCalm: You've spent time with the guide

homeWelcome.stabilizing:
There's no rush here.
Faith grows at its own pace.
homeWelcome.rhythm:
You're finding your way.
Small steps matter most.
homeWelcome.understanding: What has helped you stay close to the Savior lately?
homeWelcome.belonging: Where do you feel most at home in your faith right now?
homeWelcome.integration: Your faith is already part of your life.

encouragement.stabilizing:
Some weeks are quieter. That's okay.
The Savior walks with you.
encouragement.rhythm:
When you feel ready, you might return.
There's grace in the rhythm.
encouragement.understanding: Faith grows in questions, not just answers.
encouragement.belonging: You belong here, even on quiet weeks.

progressEmpty.stabilizing:
Your new beginning is sacred.
Every quiet moment of faith matters.
progressEmpty.rhythm:
The path is yours to walk.
There's no schedule to keep.
progressEmpty.understanding:
Reflection doesn't need evidence.
Your thoughts are enough.
progressEmpty.belonging:
Presence matters more than activity.
You're here. That's enough.
progressEmpty.integration:
Faith isn't something you finish.
It's something you live.

journalInvite.rhythm: Write when you feel like it
journalInvite.understanding:
You don't need the right words.
Write what's true, not what sounds right.
journalInvite.belonging:
Your words are for you.
No one else needs to see them.
journalInvite.integration: This space is here when you need it.
journalInvite.abiding: You don't have to return often.

belongingAffirmation.stabilizing: Your ward family is here to support you.
belongingAffirmation.understanding: Faith grows in community, not performance.
belongingAffirmation.belonging:
You belong here.
Not because of what you do, but because you're here.
belongingAffirmation.integration: Your faith is woven into your days.

progressPermanence.integration:
Faith isn't something you finish.
It's something you live.

dataPrivacy.introLine1: Everything you write here belongs to you.
dataPrivacy.introLine2: You can take it with you, anytime.
dataPrivacy.noTrackingRest: no tracking or analytics. Local data stays on this device unless you sign in and enable cloud sync separately.
dataPrivacy.confirmIntro: This will remove everything stored on this device:
dataPrivacy.bulletLeadership: Ward leadership data (local): callings, notes, calendar
dataPrivacy.recommendExport: We recommend exporting your data first.
dataPrivacy.startFresh: You can start fresh at any time.
